creator: lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk
text:
>(Wed Mar  8 09:00:06 2017) [[sssd[ldap_child[34291]]]] [ldap_child_get_tgt_sync] >(0x2000): credentials stored
>(Wed Mar  8 09:00:06 2017) [[sssd[ldap_child[34291]]]] [ldap_child_get_tgt_sync] >(0x2000): Got KDC time offset

I would recommend to synchronize time with Active directory.
And the best would be to setup some ntd daemon (ntpd, chrony, ...)
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/network-ntp.html
